original_text: The mere fact that a sentence is long does not make it a run-on sentence ; sentences are run-ons only when they contain more than one complete idea . A run-on sentence can be as short as four wordsâ '' for instance : I drive she walks .
target_simple_text: A run-on sentence is two or more sentences , put together into one sentence , without anything to join them together .
llama3_zero_shot:
🔹 **Run-on Sentence** 💡: A run-on sentence occurs when two or more independent clauses (i.e., **complete ideas**) are joined without proper punctuation.

🔹 👉 **Definition of a Run-on Sentence**: It is not about the length of the sentence, but rather whether it contains multiple complete thoughts that need to be separated with punctuation or conjunctions.

🔹 🚫 **Examples and Consequences**: Run-on sentences can range from short (e.g., "I drive she walks") to long, and they can cause confusion and make writing harder to read.
